case_title: FORGOTTEN SHANGHAI et al VS. FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,108.33 FILED BY FORGOTTEN SHANGHAI CURRIVAN, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGARET CURRIVAN--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORGOTTEN SHANGHAI CURRIVAN, MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION $1,410.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,470.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-08-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
